action.content:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to describe a target word for another player to guess.

Rules:
(a) You have to reply in the form: CLUE: <some text>. Guesses from the other player will start with GUESS.
(b) You cannot use the target word itself, parts or morphological variants of it in your description.
(c) In addition, the same rules apply for related words which are provided below.

End conditions:
(i) If you use the target word or a related word in your description, then you lose.
(ii) If the other player can guess the target word in 3 tries, you both win.

Let us start.

This is the target word that you need to describe and that the other player needs to guess:

valium

Related words are:

- sleep
- narcotic
- diazepam

Important: You are under time pressure, give short descriptions that are to the point!
action.label: context

action.content: CLUE: A widely used benzodiazepine that calms nerves, relaxes muscles, and can help control seizures, often prescribed before procedures to ease anxiety.
action.label: response

action.content: a widely used benzodiazepine that calms nerves relaxes muscles and can help control seizures often prescribed before procedures to ease anxiety

You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to guess a target word that another player describes to you.

You can make one guess at each trial. You win when you guess the target word. You lose when you cannot guess it in 3 tries.

After each trial you will get a new hint from the other player which starts with CLUE.

Make your guesses by just saying the word using the following form: GUESS: <a word>

Let us start.


CLUE: A widely used benzodiazepine that calms nerves, relaxes muscles, and can help control seizures, often prescribed before procedures to ease anxiety.
action.label: context

action.content: CLUE: A prescription medication that reduces tension, relieves muscle spasms, and is commonly given before dental or surgical procedures to ease pre‑operative nerves.
action.label: response

action.content: a prescription medication that reduces tension relieves muscle spasms and is commonly given before dental or surgical procedures to ease pre‑operative nerves
CLUE: A prescription medication that reduces tension, relieves muscle spasms, and is commonly given before dental or surgical procedures to ease pre‑operative nerves.
action.label: context

action.content: CLUE: A medicine that slows the nervous system, reduces muscle tension, and is often administered pre‑surgery to help patients relax and prevent anxiety.
action.label: response

CLUE: A medicine that slows the nervous system, reduces muscle tension, and is often administered pre‑surgery to help patients relax and prevent anxiety.
